findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via params.get()
findings.code_snippet:
params = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
    query = params.get("query", "")
    max_results = params.get("max_results", 20)
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.
